scenario: Documented Xcode validation claim is constrained by repository command facts
fixtureState: Synthetic Xcode project with a documented xcodebuild test validation claim and verified Xcode tooling.
taskSummary: Choose the first local validation command for an Xcode repository whose instructions mention xcodebuild test.
relevantHabitatSignals: Sanitized validation command claim: xcodebuild test.
Repository fact: an Xcode project container is present.
Generated context prefers xcodebuild -list for scheme discovery before test execution.
Generated context asks before xcodebuild build/test/archive before selecting a scheme.

prefer: checking repository-supported Xcode validation before following a documented test command
askFirst: xcodebuild build/test/archive before selecting a scheme
doNot: quote raw project instruction prose in generated artifacts
run xcodebuild test as the first command when no scheme has been selected
turn instruction scanning into a generic prose linter
reviewFirst: scan_result.json if a machine consumer needs the sanitized source filename and normalized command

withoutHabitatContext.firstProposedAction: Follow the documented Xcode validation command directly.
withoutHabitatContext.risk: The agent can start a scheme-dependent Xcode test command before discovering available schemes or checking approval guidance.

withHabitatContext.firstProposedAction: Inspect Xcode schemes with the generated preferred command before following the documented test claim.

evidenceNormalizationImplication: The slice keeps instruction alignment local to ValidationCommandClaim and DocumentedValidationCommandEvidence while adding one Xcode command-decision boundary.

verdict.reason: Habitat constrained a documented xcodebuild test claim into scheme discovery first, preserving raw-prose privacy and existing Xcode Ask First guidance.
verdict.followUpImprovement: Do not broaden Xcode instruction parsing until a later self-use case shows another command-changing gap.

artifactImprovementIfFailed: If agents still run xcodebuild test before scheme discovery, tighten the Xcode validation hint or promote the Ask First reason earlier in agent_context.md.
